game_name: Super Mario RPG: Legend of the Seven Stars

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Isometric 3D Platforming
special_mechanics.description: Game features gameplay within an isometric 3D environment, allowing exploration and platforming elements reminiscent of Super Mario series. Traditional Mario elements like punching floating question blocks from below are prominent.

special_mechanics.name: Party-Based Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player controls Mario and up to two other characters in active party (five characters total in roster). Party members can be swapped in and out during exploration.

tier_notes: Tier 1 - Empirical/Qualitative. Sources document game structure, gameplay mechanics, and design approach but do not provide quantified movement physics parameters, gravity values, jump mechanics, or sub-pixel precision data. Game is an RPG with platforming elements rather than a pure platformer, which may explain limited physics documentation.
